TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: moved from Austria to Germany. It was close, all in the same neighborhood on the border. And they picked me up. I refused to go. I said this to my parents. I don't want to go with you. But as a child, you get used to it. I had an older brother-- one year older. And we moved to Tarnowiec. In Tarnowiec, I was a grown up. I was raised there. I attended elementary school
